remarks: Beautiful European inspired colonial close to shopping, Merritt and easy commute to NYC, yet on quiet cul-de-sac with feel of back country. Entire home completely renovated and expanded 2004-2010. Large bright eat-in kitchen with top-of-the-line appliances. Living room with stone fireplace. Primary suite has vaulted ceiling, fireplace and spa-like bath. Room above garage with separate entrance, full bath and kitchenette perfect for in-law, nanny suite, home office. Finished family room in walk-out basement with wet bar and half bath adds 700 sq, ft. Efficient radiant heat system with separate zone for each room, extends to patio and front stairs. Modern smart home technology throughout home including unified multi-room audio/video theater system. High speed fiber internet and Cat5e/Cat6 ethernet connection in every room. Hardwired whole house alarm system with radio back-up. Professional grade surveillance system with secure remote access. Beautiful landscaping and extensive stonework including cozy firepit, pavers driveway and elegant lighting. Automated in-ground sprinkler system. Rear portion of property fenced with gardens, barn and chicken coup can be converted to storage or even pool house. Plenty of room for a pool!
